_provenance.source: Hand-authored. Maps the doc's semantic intent vocabulary (jcl.validate, zos.submit_job, etc.) to real (type, adapter, actionId) triples. Used by dataset authors to write at the intent level; the runtime never sees these aliases.

jcl.validate.summary: Run the local JCL Validator over a JCL document; returns is_valid + categorised diagnostics.

spool.interpret.summary: Run the local Spool Interpreter over a z/OS spool dump; returns summary + root cause.

zos.submit_job.summary: Submit a JCL file to the LPAR via Zowe CLI.

zos.list_jobs.summary: List jobs on the connected LPAR via Zowe CLI.

zos.inspect_spool.summary: Fetch a job's spool output via Zowe CLI for downstream interpretation.

zos.view_jcl.summary: View the JCL of a submitted job via Zowe CLI.

db2.health_check.summary: Run a Db2 health-check command via Zowe CLI.

db2.run_query.summary: Execute a Db2 query via Zowe CLI.

notification.email.summary: Send an email notification via a curl POST to a webhook.

notification.slack.summary: Send a Slack notification via a curl POST to an audited webhook.

file.save_report.summary: Save a parsed-output report to a local file via the shell.

shell.run.summary: Run an arbitrary curated shell command. Use only with the allowlisted actionIds.

ai.cloud.summarise.summary: Ask a frontier cloud model to summarise upstream output. Provider/model/prompt are configurable per node.

utility.sleep.summary: Pause the flow for a configurable duration.

utility.log.summary: Emit a log line at info/warn/error level.

utility.set_variable.summary: Set a named variable in the flow's variable scope.
